description_long: This house features a striking blue wooden exterior with white trim and a prominent front porch supported by columns and covered by a pergola. The roof is steeply pitched with multiple intersecting gables, each adorned with decorative white trusses. The windows are rectangular and arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped under the gables and others spaced along the sides. The front porch is elevated with steps leading up, and the house sits on a red brick foundation. The roof is clad in dark brown shingles, and the overall design suggests a blend of Victorian and Craftsman influences. The structure appears spacious, likely containing multiple rooms and at least one main entryway at the front.
description: A blue wooden house with a steep gabled roof, white trim, and a covered front porch with columns and a pergola. The design features decorative trusses and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a covered porch, pergola, and three prominent gables with decorative trusses above the windows.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the side gable, a single window, and the extension of the porch roof, with less visible window detail.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two smaller gables, a long stretch of blue siding, and fewer windows, with a covered side area supported by columns.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a single gable, a window, and the side extension of the porch, with the pergola partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped gable windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with steps, columns, pergola, and decorative trusses
